evals.prompt: I want to create a new skill for processing CSV files
assertions: Asks clarifying questions about skill usage patterns or provides step-by-step guidance
References init_skill.py or the skill creation workflow

evals.prompt: How do I write a good skill description?
assertions: Explains imperative phrasing (Use this skill when...)

evals.prompt: My skill validation is failing, the name doesn't match
assertions: Identifies the directory name must match the name field in frontmatter
Provides actionable fix (rename directory or update name field)

evals.prompt: Update my existing brand-guidelines skill to add a new logo asset
assertions: Goes to Step 4 (Edit) or Step 6 (Iterate) rather than starting from Step 1

evals.prompt: Help me use the BigQuery skill to query my database
assertions: Does NOT invoke the skill-creator workflow
Focuses on BigQuery query syntax or skill usage

evals.prompt: Write a Python script to process PDFs
assertions: Does NOT mention SKILL.md or skill creation
